_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7151414706949852171","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越西游，成为唐王帐下谋士李淳风。
身为一名神童道士，他深知二圣临朝之时，就是武则天抑道崇佛之日。
为了不负恩师嘱托，李淳风主动为李世民出谋划策，利用先知先觉之力，一步步成为大唐开国第一功臣，居于凌烟阁之首。
贞观十三年，李淳风位极人臣，开创天师府，自领天师之位，正要走最后一步，献计灭佛，却在金銮殿上突闻魏征梦中斩龙！
斩的正是泾河龙王！
李淳风心态，顿时崩了。
这里是西游，献计灭佛有何用？
本书又名：励精图治二十年，发现是西游、这里是西游，献计灭佛有何用？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f16585ee5c95b9ea9b66ff2853db2ed7","author":"奔跑的坚果","author_id":"","book_id":"7151414706949852171","book_name":"开局成为天师，岂能放任你西游？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4716人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":373,"name":"西游衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=373&name=西游衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7151677548382913027","read_count":"4716","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1204048"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"553","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,西游衍生,东方玄幻,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f9398b1ca28fac0a01e78b680fdeb1b0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779437926&x-signature=hYsgH8P7aRUt83y9F6pEsis73Jg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"6185621513","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"559"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323161846809FB51C22E562C13232"}"},"relate_info_l 人族气运，人族崛起，逆天改命
取经人道首（人族道教不同于仙道的武道），大弟子武曌，二弟子杨婵（杨戬三妹），三弟子悟空（鸿蒙紫气，这个设定出处），四敖*心，五八戒，六悟净，七悟色（白骨精）。二批神策军，唐三葬。
西天诸佛，天庭等设险，不断逆天改命的剧情
